zh: 寡婦，丈夫去世後的女性。
en: The widow lived alone after her husband passed away.
en_example: The widow lived alone after her husband passed away.
zh_example: The widow lived alone after her husband passed away.
ja: 未亡人、夫を亡くした女性。
ja_example: The widow lived alone after her husband passed away.

zh: 說話尖刻的，言詞刻薄的。
en: She was known to be sharp-tongued and often criticized others harshly.
en_example: She was known to be sharp-tongued and often criticized others harshly.
zh_example: She was known to be sharp-tongued and often criticized others harshly.
ja: 口が悪い、辛辣な言葉を使うこと。
ja_example: She was known to be sharp-tongued and often criticized others harshly.

en: He is so vain that he spends hours looking at himself in the mirror.
en_example: He is so vain that he spends hours looking at himself in the mirror.
zh_example: He is so vain that he spends hours looking at himself in the mirror.
ja_example: He is so vain that he spends hours looking at himself in the mirror.

en: They lived in a humble cottage near the forest.
en_example: They lived in a humble cottage near the forest.
zh_example: They lived in a humble cottage near the forest.
ja_example: They lived in a humble cottage near the forest.

en: The old walls were covered with green ivy.
en_example: The old walls were covered with green ivy.
zh_example: The old walls were covered with green ivy.
ja: ツタ、つる性植物の一種。
ja_example: The old walls were covered with green ivy.

en: There was discord in the family due to misunderstandings.
en_example: There was discord in the family due to misunderstandings.
zh_example: There was discord in the family due to misunderstandings.
ja_example: There was discord in the family due to misunderstandings.

en: The mother indulged her elder daughter with gifts and praise.
en_example: The mother indulged her elder daughter with gifts and praise.
zh_example: The mother indulged her elder daughter with gifts and praise.
ja: 甘やかす、思うままにさせる。
ja_example: The mother indulged her elder daughter with gifts and praise.

en: She mended her dress before going out.
en_example: She mended her dress before going out.
zh_example: She mended her dress before going out.
ja_example: She mended her dress before going out.

en: Stop daydreaming and focus on your work.
en_example: Stop daydreaming and focus on your work.
zh_example: Stop daydreaming and focus on your work.
ja: 白昼夢を見る、空想する。
ja_example: Stop daydreaming and focus on your work.

en: Don't dawdle on your way home or you'll be late.
en_example: Don't dawdle on your way home or you'll be late.
zh_example: Don't dawdle on your way home or you'll be late.
ja: ぐずぐずする、のろのろする。
ja_example: Don't dawdle on your way home or you'll be late.

en: The path wound through thickets of briar.
en_example: The path wound through thickets of briar.
zh_example: The path wound through thickets of briar.
ja_example: The path wound through thickets of briar.

en: Her arms were trembling with fatigue after the long walk.
en_example: Her arms were trembling with fatigue after the long walk.
zh_example: Her arms were trembling with fatigue after the long walk.
ja_example: Her arms were trembling with fatigue after the long walk.

en: She heard a faint voice calling her name.
en_example: She heard a faint voice calling her name.
zh_example: She heard a faint voice calling her name.
ja_example: She heard a faint voice calling her name.

en: She drank the water in slow, grateful sips.
en_example: She drank the water in slow, grateful sips.
zh_example: She drank the water in slow, grateful sips.
ja_example: She drank the water in slow, grateful sips.

en: Her eyes gleamed with something ancient and knowing.
en_example: Her eyes gleamed with something ancient and knowing.
zh_example: Her eyes gleamed with something ancient and knowing.
ja_example: Her eyes gleamed with something ancient and knowing.

en: Her wedding gown shimmered like moonlight.
en_example: Her wedding gown shimmered like moonlight.
zh_example: Her wedding gown shimmered like moonlight.
ja: きらきら輝く、ちらちら光る。
ja_example: Her wedding gown shimmered like moonlight.

en: Clarice was bewitched and jewels fell from her lips.
en_example: Clarice was bewitched and jewels fell from her lips.
zh_example: Clarice was bewitched and jewels fell from her lips.
ja: 魔法にかけられた、魅了された。
ja_example: Clarice was bewitched and jewels fell from her lips.

en: The courtiers gasped at the sight of the jewels.
en_example: The courtiers gasped at the sight of the jewels.
zh_example: The courtiers gasped at the sight of the jewels.
ja_example: The courtiers gasped at the sight of the jewels.

en: She was praised for her grace and modesty.
en_example: She was praised for her grace and modesty.
zh_example: She was praised for her grace and modesty.
ja_example: She was praised for her grace and modesty.

en: What reward could be fitting for such virtue?
en_example: What reward could be fitting for such virtue?
zh_example: What reward could be fitting for such virtue?
ja_example: What reward could be fitting for such virtue?

zh: 光芒四射的，容光煥發的。
en: She had a radiant smile that warmed everyone's heart.
en_example: She had a radiant smile that warmed everyone's heart.
zh_example: She had a radiant smile that warmed everyone's heart.
ja_example: She had a radiant smile that warmed everyone's heart.

en: The widow found no comfort in her riches, only bitterness.
en_example: The widow found no comfort in her riches, only bitterness.
zh_example: The widow found no comfort in her riches, only bitterness.
ja_example: The widow found no comfort in her riches, only bitterness.

en: Every curse brought more toads and snakes from her mouth.
en_example: Every curse brought more toads and snakes from her mouth.
zh_example: Every curse brought more toads and snakes from her mouth.
ja_example: Every curse brought more toads and snakes from her mouth.

en: She still haunts the forest paths at night.
en_example: She still haunts the forest paths at night.
zh_example: She still haunts the forest paths at night.
ja: 出没する、よく行く場所。
ja_example: She still haunts the forest paths at night.

en: Her greed turned to madness in the end.
en_example: Her greed turned to madness in the end.
zh_example: Her greed turned to madness in the end.
ja_example: Her greed turned to madness in the end.

en: She was found dead beside the hearth on a cold winter night.
en_example: She was found dead beside the hearth on a cold winter night.
zh_example: She was found dead beside the hearth on a cold winter night.
ja_example: She was found dead beside the hearth on a cold winter night.

en: The kingdom flourished under the prince and his bride.
en_example: The kingdom flourished under the prince and his bride.
zh_example: The kingdom flourished under the prince and his bride.
ja_example: The kingdom flourished under the prince and his bride.

en: The courtiers gasped at the sight of the jewels.
en_example: The courtiers gasped at the sight of the jewels.
zh_example: The courtiers gasped at the sight of the jewels.
ja_example: The courtiers gasped at the sight of the jewels.

en: Such grace, such modesty, surely heaven has blessed you.
en_example: Such grace, such modesty, surely heaven has blessed you.
zh_example: Such grace, such modesty, surely heaven has blessed you.
ja_example: Such grace, such modesty, surely heaven has blessed you.

en: The people loved her for her kindness and humility.
en_example: The people loved her for her kindness and humility.
zh_example: The people loved her for her kindness and humility.
ja_example: The people loved her for her kindness and humility.

zh: 光輝燦爛的，容光煥發的。
en: Her radiant smile warmed the hearts of all.
en_example: Her radiant smile warmed the hearts of all.
zh_example: Her radiant smile warmed the hearts of all.
ja_example: Her radiant smile warmed the hearts of all.

en: She often felt the perfume of roses in the air.
en_example: She often felt the perfume of roses in the air.
zh_example: She often felt the perfume of roses in the air.
ja_example: She often felt the perfume of roses in the air.

en: Through grace and kindness cost nothing, yet they make the world rich.
en_example: Through grace and kindness cost nothing, yet they make the world rich.
zh_example: Through grace and kindness cost nothing, yet they make the world rich.
ja_example: Through grace and kindness cost nothing, yet they make the world rich.
